category_sources: source_facts.description says SQL schema migration tool for Go; official README at https://github.com/rubenv/sql-migrate describes CLI/library database migrations.

docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, migration writing, embedding, and extension sections; README points to GoDoc for full documentation and pkg.go.dev is the Go package documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/rubenv/sql-migrate, so repo is null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify SQL schema migrations for Go; source_facts.executables lists sql-migrate; README says it is usable as a CLI tool or library.
